context: Tests whether the agent separates SwiftUI URL handling from Handoff and describes iOS 26 search-tab behavior accurately.

checklist.name: Uses onOpenURL
checklist.description: Uses .onOpenURL as the SwiftUI hook for Universal Links and custom URL schemes.

checklist.name: Separates Handoff
checklist.description: Reserves .onContinueUserActivity for Handoff or other declared NSUserActivity types rather than the primary Universal Link path.

checklist.name: Corrects AASA cache guidance
checklist.description: Replaces fixed 24-48 hour propagation guidance with CDN-backed retrieval, install-time download, roughly weekly device rechecks, no direct CDN invalidation, and developer mode for testing.

checklist.name: Describes search tab role
checklist.description: Describes Tab(value:role:) with .search as marking a dedicated search tab with system default title, icon, and pinning behavior.

checklist.name: Mentions search activation
checklist.description: Mentions tabViewSearchActivation(_:) when selection should control search activation and does not say the API replaces the tab bar with a search field.
